# iosxe_crypto_pki_certificate_pool (Data Source)

This data source can read the Crypto PKI Certificate Pool configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_crypto_pki_certificate_pool" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `cabundle` (String) save the bundle file
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
